title: Issue with Custom integration when trying to integrate with api
excerpt: Facing issue with custom integration while doing integration with public api (springboot app) for text transformation. I have created a recipe with custom trigger and custom action. Though i was able to add workflow on m…

posts.author: Dharmpal (Dharmpal)
posts.cookedHtml: Facing issue with custom integration while doing integration with public api (springboot app) for text transformation. I have created a recipe with custom trigger and custom action. Though i was able to add workflow on my board but call to api was not happening. Is there any place where I can monitor the request/logs?
